records.m_Talk_FRA: Someone suddenly burst up through the roof, so I came because it seemed suspicious.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah... that doll did leave in quite a flashy way. She muttered something about an intruder.

records.m_Talk_DEU: An intruder...? Has someone come to the Promised Land?
records.m_Talk_FRA: An intruder...? Has someone come to the Promised Land?

records.m_Talk_DEU: No. More importantly, I will get you out of there!
records.m_Talk_FRA: No. More importantly, I will get you out of there!

records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Did you just bend those bars with your arms? I thought you had a frail body.

records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know why... but after regaining my memories, it seems my strength has returned as well.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Your memories from when you were Mors came back? I didn't even notice since the way you speak is the same.

records.m_Talk_DEU: That is likely because the girl's old memories also still coexist within me...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That is likely because the girl's old memories also still coexist within me...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're cute, so what does it matter. Let's get out of this damned Promised Land already.

records.m_Talk_FRA: You're cute, so what does it matter. Let's get out of this damned Promised Land already.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Leave the Promised Land? But how...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Audra told me the location of a place called <color=#ffd34c>Avalon's Gate</color>. If we pass through there, we should be able to get outside.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Audra told me the location of a place called <color=#ffd34c>Avalon's Gate</color>. If we pass through there, we should be able to get outside.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Audra told me the location of a place called <color=#ffd34c>Avalon's Gate</color>. If we pass through there, we should be able to get outside.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Audra...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Audra...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Audra...

records.m_Talk_ENG: She is the former self of Thagirion. Do you truly intend to trust her words?
records.m_Talk_DEU: She is the former self of Thagirion. Do you truly intend to trust her words?
records.m_Talk_FRA: She is the former self of Thagirion. Do you truly intend to trust her words?

records.m_Talk_ENG: She might have some other motive... but at least to me, it didn't look like she was pretending.

records.m_Talk_FRA: She might have some other motive... but at least to me, it didn't look like she was pretending.

records.m_Talk_DEU: What do you think? Do you think she was lying?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What do you think? Do you think she was lying?

records.m_Talk_ENG: In my memories as well, she was not a child who knew how to lie.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In my memories as well, she was not a child who knew how to lie.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In my memories as well, she was not a child who knew how to lie.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Audra has not shown a single moment of malice until now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Audra has not shown a single moment of malice until now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Audra has not shown a single moment of malice until now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She could have resented me for being Nequitia. Instead, she even accepted me as a member of the Promised Land. It's true she brought us here without permission... But I think it's all right to trust her for now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She could have resented me for being Nequitia. Instead, she even accepted me as a member of the Promised Land. It's true she brought us here without permission... But I think it's all right to trust her for now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She could have resented me for being Nequitia. Instead, she even accepted me as a member of the Promised Land. It's true she brought us here without permission... But I think it's all right to trust her for now.

records.m_Talk_DEU: Snow began to fall a short while ago, so before long the monsters will appear.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Snow began to fall a short while ago, so before long the monsters will appear.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I will accompany you to Avalon's Gate as well, Ms. Leah.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I will accompany you to Avalon's Gate as well, Ms. Leah.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I will accompany you to Avalon's Gate as well, Ms. Leah.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right. Let's go.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right. Let's go.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right. Let's go.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And... thank you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And... thank you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And... thank you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For trusting us, and fighting alongside us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For trusting us, and fighting alongside us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For trusting us, and fighting alongside us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...The sun is setting.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...The sun is setting.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...The sun is setting.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We should hurry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We should hurry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We should hurry.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Today, we have gathered here for a special wish.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Today, we have gathered here for a special wish.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Today, we have gathered here for a special wish.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Golden Tree, which granted us the peaceful life called the Promised Land after the end of the world without asking anything in return...
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Golden Tree, which granted us the peaceful life called the Promised Land after the end of the world without asking anything in return...
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Golden Tree, which granted us the peaceful life called the Promised Land after the end of the world without asking anything in return...

root.m_Talk_ENG: is now being threatened from the outside.
root.m_Talk_DEU: is now being threatened from the outside.
root.m_Talk_FRA: is now being threatened from the outside.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So I ask that you all...
root.m_Talk_DEU: So I ask that you all...
root.m_Talk_FRA: So I ask that you all...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Today, offer your prayers not for your own wishes, but for the Golden Tree.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Today, offer your prayers not for your own wishes, but for the Golden Tree.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry, Father. I will offer my wish for the sake of the Promised Land.

root.m_Talk_DEU: Though it was only for a moment, we all clearly witnessed the sun set and night fall, Father. That means the time of prophecy has come.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Though it was only for a moment, we all clearly witnessed the sun set and night fall, Father. That means the time of prophecy has come.

root.m_Talk_DEU: I have never forgotten, not even for a moment, the tragedy of the end that the Ignorant Monarch Thagirion brought. If it's to stop that, I would offer not only my wish but even my life.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I have never forgotten, not even for a moment, the tragedy of the end that the Ignorant Monarch Thagirion brought. If it's to stop that, I would offer not only my wish but even my life.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As do I.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As do I.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As do I.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Though our beliefs, ideals, and the times we were born and lived in are all different, we share a common wish.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Though our beliefs, ideals, and the times we were born and lived in are all different, we share a common wish.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Though our beliefs, ideals, and the times we were born and lived in are all different, we share a common wish.

root.m_Talk_DEU: That wish is to complete a world where no one suffers any longer because of the Ignorant Monarch Thagirion... The perfect Promised Land, Anapilis.

root.m_Talk_DEU: Now that the fulfillment of that prophecy is near...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now that the fulfillment of that prophecy is near...

root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Let us all pray together.

root.m_Talk_FRA: What... is that sound?

root.m_Talk_FRA: ...You? Who are you?

root.m_Talk_FRA: This is the Promised Land.

root.m_Talk_FRA: That's... deception.

root.m_Talk_FRA: It's a reality that will one day come true.

root.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh, why have you bound me? What are you trying to do?!

root.m_Talk_DEU: This flower is the white frost flower that can sever fate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This flower is the white frost flower that can sever fate.
